Class MessagesView

java.lang.Object
dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.lang.MessagesView
public final class MessagesView extends Object
Scope-aware mirror of Messages. Resolves the backing LanguageManager lazily per call so re-registration of the scope while a view is held remains valid.
